## Change Description | 变更描述
<!-- Briefly describe the changes in this PR | 简要描述这个 PR 的变更内容 -->

## Change Type | 变更类型
- [ ] Bug fix | Bug 修复
- [ ] New feature | 新功能
- [ ] Documentation update | 文档更新
- [ ] Code refactoring | 代码重构
- [ ] Performance optimization | 性能优化
- [ ] Testing | 测试
- [ ] Other | 其他 (please specify | 请说明):

## Related Issue | 相关 Issue
Closes #(issue number | issue 编号)

## Testing | 测试
<!-- Describe how you tested these changes | 描述你如何测试这些变更 -->

- [ ] Tested on Linux | 在 Linux 上测试
- [ ] Tested on macOS | 在 macOS 上测试
- [ ] Added test cases | 添加了测试用例
- [ ] All tests pass | 所有测试通过

## Checklist | 检查清单
- [ ] Code follows project standards | 代码遵循项目规范
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation | 已更新相关文档
- [ ] Added necessary comments | 已添加必要的注释
- [ ] No new warnings introduced | 没有引入新的警告
- [ ] Tested all changes | 已测试所有变更

## Screenshots | 截图 (if applicable | 如适用)
<!-- Add screenshots to help explain changes | 添加截图帮助说明变更 -->

## Additional Information | 额外信息
<!-- Any other information that needs to be explained | 其他需要说明的信息 -->
